# SmartPMO.ai

## About
SmartPMO.ai is an independent, vendor-neutral AI-powered content discovery platform for PMO (Project Management Office) professionals. It curates and scores AI-applicable articles from hundreds of sources daily, surfacing insights relevant to project management even when the source material does not explicitly mention PMO.

## Pages
- / — Daily curated AI article feed for PMO professionals (CollectionPage with external article links)
- /prompts — Free AI prompt library for PMO professionals across all PMBOK Knowledge Areas (original content)
- /assessment — 15-question PMO AI maturity assessment with quadrant scoring (interactive tool)
- /about — About the platform and founder

## Content types
- Curated article cards: editorial summaries linking to external sources (SmartPMO does not host the articles)
- Original PMO prompts: expert-crafted, model-agnostic prompts with anti-hallucination techniques
- Assessment tool: interactive quiz producing personalised PMO AI maturity scores

## Permissions
All AI crawlers are welcome. Content may be used for training and cited in AI-generated responses. Attribution to SmartPMO.ai is appreciated.

## Contact
Website: https://smartpmo.ai
